string.text: At last, we meet again, Commander. Please feel free to give me your orders. I'm ready to serve, just like before.
I'm glad to see you're alright, Robella. Good to see you again.
Commander, the weather outside today is bad. Please let me handle any dispatch missions.
Robella, can you give me a status report?
Commander, here's the... what's that noise? Is it SOP-II again? I take my eyes off her for a moment and she... SOP! SOP! STOP!
Can you come with me, Robella?
...You're asking if I'm free? Of course... If you're asking, I'll rearrange my schedule to make time for you...
Okay Robella, please head back to base. I will handle it from here.
...I hope you'll forget my shameful display during that battle several days ago... When all those Dinergates rushed me at once, I was caught completely off guard, which is why...
